# Dwarf Pipe

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

![[17007.png]]

*Item. Pipe.*

---

Attach to a **_Dwarf**_ character. Limit 1 per character.
**Response:** After a card is discarded from your deck, exhaust Dwarf Pipe to place that card on the bottom of your deck.
